category_sources: Official README describes isort as a Python utility/library to sort imports alphabetically and by section/type.
source_facts.description says it sorts Python imports automatically.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and documentation use isort.
docs_sources: Official README contains installation and usage documentation.
Official README links to Read Latest Documentation on isort.readthedocs.io.
source_facts.homepage is https://pycqa.github.io/isort, an official documentation homepage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page identifies PyCQA/isort as the project repository.
source_facts.repo was empty; official README links to Browse GitHub Code Repository.
tags_sources: Official README describes CLI/library use and official pre-commit support.
